title: COLORETTO 304 Ink Cartridges Black and Colour for HP 304 XL for DeskJet 3750 3760 3700 3762 2600 2630 2632 Envy 5000 5032 5030 AMP 120 Printer Ink for HP 304 Replacement, 2 Pack
features: Latest Chip & High Page Yield: COLORETTO 304 XL (1 black, 1 colour; 2 pack, non-OEM) remanufactured ink cartridges use advanced chip technology to accurately read ink levels. The 304XL black ink cartridge (22 ml) prints at least 700 pages, and the 304XL colour ink cartridge (20 ml) prints at least 450 pages (based on 5% coverage of A4 paper), effectively saving printing costs
Excellent Printing Effect: This product utilizes premium ink to deliver bright, clear, and smooth prints, ensuring your documents and photos showcase vibrant colours and intricate details

Easy Installation & Reliable Durability: Quick and simple setup. Each ink cartridge is rigorously tested for performance and stability, minimizing issues like clogging and recognition errors. Enjoy hasslefree printing with confidence

Trusted COLORETTO: Our remanufactured ink cartridges are packaged to high standards to ensure safe transit. Enjoy peace of mind with our 12-month after-sales service, ensuring confidence in your purchase and use. (Packaging may vary)
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Why Prints More 2 How to Install Previous page Next page Previous page Next page 1 CostLess 2 Our Responsibility 3 Wide Application 4 Reliable Support COLORETTO 304XL Remanufactured Ink Cartridge Series 304 XL Black & Colour Add To Basket 304 XL 2Black Add To Basket 304 XL Black Add To Basket 304 XL Colour Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 60 4.4 out of 5 stars 60 4.3 out of 5 stars 48 4.3 out of 5 stars 37 Price £21.59 £ 21 . 59 £20.89 £ 20 . 89 £13.99 £ 13 . 99 £15.99 £ 15 . 99 Package Content 1 Black & 1 Colour 2 Black 1 Black 1 Colour Page Yield 700 Black, 450 Tri-color 700 Pages per Black 700 Pages per Black 450 Pages per Tri-color High Quality ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Identify Ink level ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Feature the Latest Chip ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ What if my printer does not recognize the ink cartridges? Remove and reinstall the cartridges, repeating 1-3 times. If the problem continues, gently clean the nozzle and chip using the provided cleaning wipe, then reinstall the cartridges. How is the print quality? Delivers sharp text and vibrant colors with premium quick-dry ink. Prints stay clean, smudge-free, and consistent—ideal for documents, charts, and photos. Can they be refilled with ink? No, these cartridges cannot be refilled. We do not recommend refilling them as it may affect their performance. What's the difference between standard and XL cartridges? XL cartridges hold more ink than standard ones. They print significantly more pages,which is often double the standard yield. This means lower cost per page. Should I choose a black or a color cartridge? If you mainly print text documents, invoices, reports, or forms, the black cartridge is sufficient. If you often print images, presentations, charts, schoolwork, or photos, using both black and color cartridges is recommended.
